description: This Python module defines API endpoints for managing a user's recipes, including listing, creating, updating, and deleting recipes. It uses FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and custom schemas and mappers for request/response handling.

methods.name: str _new_id()
methods.description: Generates a new UUID string for recipe IDs.

methods.name: list_my_recipes(user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Endpoint to list recipes owned by the current user.

methods.name: create_my_recipe( body: RecipeCreateRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Endpoint to create a new recipe for the current user.

methods.name: update_my_recipe( recipe_id: str, body: RecipeUpdateRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Endpoint to update an existing recipe owned by the current user.

methods.name: delete_my_recipe(recipe_id: str, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Endpoint to delete a recipe owned by the current user.
